title: cracca fasciculata
intro: Cracca fasciculata, also known as tick trefoil, is a perennial legume native to the United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca fasciculata include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
